findings.evidence: Primitive type `bool` used for `extraCheese` instead of a small class/enum.

Method is never invoked anywhere in the file.

Method initiates a chain of method calls (`cleanKitchen`).
Method delegates to `middleMethod` with no added behavior.
Method accesses `pizza`'s internal details (`getTopping`).
Method overrides inherited behavior with an empty body.
